novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	In the novel, he was a subordinate of Liu Zhang. He surrendered to Zhao Yun upon the capture of Zhang Ren.

full_text:
Zhuo Ying 卓膺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuo Ying (卓膺). Assisted Huang Zhong in helping Liu Bei take over Liu Zhang. Zhuo Ying was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
